articles.author: Carolyn Y. Johnson
articles.title: NASA approves 6-minute engine burn to send Artemis II toward the moon - washingtonpost.com
articles.description: The engine burn is a pivotal move that will put the astronauts on a path that humans haven’t traveled in half a century — one with plenty of risks.
articles.content:
The Artemis II astronauts will blast their main engine Thursday evening to propel the Orion capsule out of Earths orbit and on to its next phase a four-day journey toward the moon.
The six-minute en… [+407 chars]

articles.title: NASA engineers in Houston fix crappy situation for astronauts - Chron
articles.description: Not long after launch, Artemis II mission specialist Christina Koch reported a problem with Integrity's toilet. Houston was there to help.
articles.content: Houston plays a vital role in spaceflight. We don't launch the rockets, but the intrepid scientists at the Johnson Space Center here in Space City monitor spaceflights and troubleshoot problems that … [+5900 chars]
